why_it_matters: Key entry point may not travel.
what_would_validate: External readers recognize and respond to it.
what_would_falsify: Readers do not understand or care.

what_not_validated: Knowledge Clump language not externally validated
what_would_validate: External reviewers can explain it back correctly.

why_it_matters: Core architecture may be too heavy.
what_would_validate: A small knowledge item passes through the whole circuit.

why_it_matters: New Project may not reproduce working mode.
what_would_validate: New Project boots correctly and avoids generic drift.
what_would_falsify: New Project ignores or misuses mentor layer.

what_not_validated: Obsidian/Git as memory not practically validated
why_it_matters: Toolchain may be useful but not stable runtime.

what_not_validated: Field feedback to controlled rebuild not tested
why_it_matters: Core learning cycle may be idealized.
what_would_validate: Real feedback leads to reviewed update.
what_would_falsify: Feedback creates chaos or no useful update.
